title: Section 26321
text: (a) This act shall be known, and may be cited, as the Medicinal Cannabis Patients’ Right of Access Act. (b) For purposes of this chapter: (1) “Medicinal cannabis” means medicinal cannabis or medicinal cannabis products, as those terms are defined in paragraph (1) of subdivision (ai) of Section

structure.chapter_title: Medicinal Cannabis Patients’ Right of Access Act
